name: Animated Beam
description: An animated beam effect that draws a curved line between two elements, simulating a connection or data flow path with a glowing gradient.
whenToUse: Use for architecture diagrams, connection visualizations, or showing data flow between components on a page.

props.name: containerRef
props.description: Ref to the container element that bounds the beam

props.name: fromRef
props.description: Ref to the source element where the beam starts

props.name: toRef
props.description: Ref to the target element where the beam ends

props.name: curvature
props.description: Amount of curve applied to the beam path
